hypothesis: Replacing the CATS-based pharmacophore similarity with a multi-conformer 3D pharmacophore field similarity in the RL reward will, among the top 100 generated molecules, at least double the hit rate of ERα antagonists with IC50 ≤ 1 µM in a standardized cell-based reporter assay compared to the original framework, while maintaining a mean Tanimoto similarity to the reference set ≤ 0.36.
